product_highlights: Octocrylene (2-Ethylhexyl 2-Cyano-3,3-Diphenyl Acrylate) - UV filter and photostabilizer
Prevents photodegradation of avobenzone in sunscreen formulations
Dual function: UVB filter and photostabilizer for other UV filters
FDA OTC-approved for use in US sunscreen products
notes: Riverland Trading is a US-based chemical distributor specializing in octocrylene (CAS 6197-30-4), a multifunctional UV filter and photostabilizer widely used in sunscreen formulations. Octocrylene serves a dual role as both a UVB filter and a critical photostabilizer that prevents the degradation of avobenzone, ensuring long-lasting broad-spectrum protection. FDA OTC-approved for US sunscreen products, octocrylene is an essential component in photostable broad-spectrum sunscreen systems.
